title: The St. Louis Kid
writer: Warren Duff, Seton I. Miller, Frederick Hazlitt Brennan
actors: James Cagney, Patricia Ellis, Allen Jenkins
plot: Trucker Eddie Kennedy gets involved with the law when he has an car accident with Ann Reid and knocks the owner of a dairy out. He evades a penalty when he claims, that he had done it as an act of solidarism with the farmers. The ...
